strings.mobile.search.clearHistoryMessage: Removes recent searches and destinations stored on this device.
strings.mobile.search.noResultsMessage: No matches for '%@'. Try different keywords or open a tab from Actions.
strings.mobile.search.offlineNotice: You are offline. Recent searches are shown; new results need a connection.
strings.mobile.search.title: Search
strings.mobile.sessions.description: Ces appareils et navigateurs peuvent accéder à votre compte. Déconnectez ceux que vous ne reconnaissez pas.
strings.mobile.sessions.emptyMessage: Seul cet appareil est connecté pour le moment.
strings.mobile.sessions.loadError: Impossible de charger les sessions actives.
strings.mobile.sessions.profileHint: Voyez où vous êtes connecté et déconnectez les appareils perdus.
strings.mobile.sessions.revokeOthersError: Impossible de déconnecter les autres sessions.
strings.mobile.sessions.signOutOthersConfirm: Déconnecter toutes les autres sessions ? Les autres appareils devront se reconnecter. Cet appareil reste connecté.
strings.mobile.sessions.title: Sessions actives
strings.mobile.settings.appearance.description: Choisissez l’apparence de Lextures sur cet appareil.
strings.mobile.tutor.askAiCourseHint: Choose a course for tutoring help, or ask from your notebooks below.
strings.mobile.tutor.askAiNotebookHint: Questions without a course use your saved notebooks.
strings.mobile.tutor.budgetExceeded: You have reached your monthly AI interaction limit.
strings.mobile.tutor.disabled: AI tutor is not available for your account.
strings.mobile.tutor.disclosureBody: This feature sends your input to an AI model for processing. You can opt out anytime in account settings.
strings.mobile.tutor.noNotebooks: Save notes in a notebook first, then you can ask here.
strings.mobile.tutor.offline: AI tutor needs an internet connection.
strings.mobile.tutor.title: AI tutor
strings.mobile.uiMode.adminOverride: Your teacher set this mode for you.
strings.mobile.uiMode.description: Use a simpler layout with bigger buttons for younger learners.
strings.mobile.uiMode.title: Interface mode
strings.mobile.vibe.webOnlyHint: Some parts of this activity work best on a larger screen. Open it in your browser to use every feature.
strings.mobile.vibe.webOnlyMessage: Vibe activities are available on the web app for now.
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.predictedNotic: Risk scores are predicted from course signals — not a final determination.
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.atRisk.title: At-risk students
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.atRisk.subtitl: See who may need help and why
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.atRisk.emptyHi: When the system flags students, they will appear here.
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.severity.label: %@ (%d)
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.whatsWorking.e: Insights appear after enough class activity is recorded.
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.message.body:
Hi %@,

I noticed %@ in our course and wanted to check in. Let me know if you need help.
strings.mobile.wallet.title: Credentials wallet
strings.mobile.wallet.emptyMessage: Complete courses and activities to earn credentials, transcripts, and badges.
strings.mobile.wallet.officialTranscriptsHint: Order an official transcript through your institution's request flow.
strings.mobile.wallet.ccr.emptyAchievements: Complete courses and earn badges to build your CCR.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessDeniedMessag: You do not have permission to edit this course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sectionComingSoon: This section is available on web for now. Mobile support is coming soon.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.confi: This will erase existing modules and related content, then apply the backup. Continue?
This will add new items from the backup without removing existing content. Continue?
This will update this course from the backup and remove outline items not in the file. Continue?
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.expor: Download the full course bundle as one JSON file: syllabus, modules, assignments, quizzes, grading, roster, and settings.
Backups may include student-authored content. Be careful when sharing the file.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.fileT: That backup is too large to import on this device. Use the web app instead.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.impor: Restore this course from a JSON backup produced by Lextures.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.inval: That file is not valid JSON.
Import file must contain a JSON object.
Remove all modules and related content, then apply the backup.
Keep existing content and add items whose ids are not already present.
Update this course from the backup and remove outline items not listed in the file.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.webIm: QTI, Common Cartridge, and Canvas imports are available on the web app.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.title: Title
strings.mobile.courseSettings.publishedHint: Students can access a published course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.theme.heading: Heading color
strings.mobile.courseSettings.validation.content: Choose a content page for the course home
strings.mobile.courseSettings.hero.uploadHint: JPEG or PNG, up to 10 MB.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.hero.fileTooLarge: Image must be 10 MB or smaller.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.accessDe: Org administrators manage district blueprint courses here. Ask your platform admin for access.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.descript: Designate a master course and push structural updates to linked child courses. Teachers keep local items they add outside the blueprint copy.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.statusBl: This course is a district blueprint master.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.notBluep: Enable blueprint designation to link child courses and push structural updates.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.childLin: This course is linked to blueprint %@.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.enableDe: Turn this course into a master blueprint course.
Child courses cannot be toggled as blueprints until unlinked.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.linkedCh: Child shells must have no modules yet. Linking copies all blueprint modules and items once.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.unlinkCo: Unlink %@ from this blueprint? Copied course content is not removed.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.pushDesc: Applies blueprint changes to all linked children. Locally added items in children are preserved.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.pushConf: This will apply blueprint structural changes to all linked child courses. Continue?
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.offlineP: Connect to the internet to push blueprint updates.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.offlineM: Connect to the internet to link or unlink child courses.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.noChildr: Link at least one child course before pushing updates.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.linkSucc: Child course linked and initial sync completed.
